description: Style NoteUnderstated and compact, yet spacious, this Linos Perros bag works the military aesthetic with its rugged cool. Add this to your accessory arsenal and you'll not regret it. The right bag for versatile styling, use this piece to pare down a dressy frock for a casual do or to add a hint of sporty to an oh-so-girly ensemble.Product DetailsPolyester blend upperTwo short handlesAppliquéd brand patch on the frontTwo zipped pockets on the sides and one on the frontTwo main zipped compartments with an inner zipped compartmentA removable and adjustable shoulder strap made of fabricMaterial and CareBlended polyesterWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 12 cmWidth: 20 cmDepth: 8 cm
